**Site:** ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini (delete the others)

**What's not getting blurred?**
e.g. "individual sidebar conversation rows", "GPTs in the sidebar", "active chat title in the header"

**Working selector (from DevTools)**
Inspect a row that should be blurred and paste a selector that matches it.

```
<!-- example -->
[data-test-id="conversation"]
```

**Browser / version**
e.g. Chrome 142 on macOS 15.1

**Anything else**
Screenshot welcome.
